identity.emotional_goal: Calmness under pressure. The UI should feel like a high-tech cockpit that organizes chaos.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,212,255,0.3)] transition-all duration-300

cards.base: bg-[#121a2f] border border-slate-800 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:border-slate-700 transition-colors

inputs.base: bg-[#0b1320] border-slate-700 text-slate-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary placeholder:text-slate-600

badges.base: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Medical Theme. Do not introduce light mode unless explicitly asked.
Use 'Manrope' for all UI text and 'JetBrains Mono' for all numerical data (HR, BP, SpO2).
Implement the ICU Dashboard with a 3x2 grid of 'Patient Cards'. Each card must show real-time vitals and a mini-ECG.
The 'Critical' state (Red) must have a pulsing glow animation (use Tailwind `animate-pulse` or custom keyframes).
Use Socket.io for real-time updates. Simulate data updates every 2 seconds.
Ensure high contrast for all text. Primary text is #e6edf3, Secondary is #94a3b8.
For graphs, use Recharts. The ECG should look like a moving line (simulate using a sliding window of data points).
Login page should use the 'Futuristic Hospital Corridor' image as a blurred background with a glassmorphism card on top.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic 'Inter' for everything. Use the specified fonts.
Avoid gradients for text. Use solid colors for maximum readability.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
Keep the UI 'dense' but 'breathing'. Use 1px borders to separate grid items.
For the 'Risk Engine', use color coding: Low (Green), Moderate (Yellow), High (Orange), Critical (Red).
